# External eval corpus — licensing NOTICE

Problems under this directory are **derived from third-party HuggingFace datasets** and are kept **segregated** from the MIT-licensed plugin. Several carry **non-commercial** terms. Do **NOT** ship these verbatim in the published package; use them for internal eval/research only, or transform them into new prompts before any redistribution.

| Source | License | Terms |
|---|---|---|
| Jackrong/financial-economics-reasoning | Apache-2.0 | Distilled (Qwen-3-235B); research / non-commercial; commercial use may need authorization |
| medreason/llm-medical-reasoning-steps-benchmark | **CC BY-NC 4.0** | Non-commercial; not for clinical use; attribution required |
| nguha/legalbench | CC-BY-4.0 | Per-task licenses vary — verify the specific config |
| Jackrong/GLM-5.1-Reasoning-1M-Cleaned | Apache-2.0 | GLM-5.1 distilled; we reuse prompt stems only |
| trjxter/DeepSeek-V4-Pro-Reasoning-8000x | Apache-2.0 | Derivative of GLM-1M (dedupe) |

Generated by `evals/datasets/ingest-hf.js`. See `analysis/DATASET-SCAN.md` for the assessment and build plan.
